info.name: Mission Bazar API

exec: var j = pm.response.json(); if(j.data && j.data.message) { pm.collectionVariables.set('regEmail', pm.request.body.raw ? JSON.parse(pm.request.body.raw).email : ''); }
var j = pm.response.json(); if(j.data && j.data.accessToken) { pm.collectionVariables.set('accessToken', j.data.accessToken); }
var j = pm.response.json(); if(j.data && j.data.accessToken) { pm.collectionVariables.set('accessToken', j.data.accessToken); }
var j = pm.response.json(); if(j.data && j.data.accessToken) { pm.collectionVariables.set('accessToken', j.data.accessToken); }

request.description: Reads refresh token from HttpOnly cookie. Run in browser or set cookie manually.

body.raw:

request.description: Returns MAIN → SUB → PRODUCT nested structure
Returns all active SUB_SUB (leaf) categories with their full parent chain populated (SUB → MAIN). Use this list for the product-creation category picker.

exec: var j = pm.response.json(); if(j.data && j.data._id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('categoryId', j.data._id); }

request.description:
Create a MAIN (top-level) category. No parent required.

Hierarchy: MAIN → SUB → SUB_SUB
Products can only be assigned to SUB_SUB (leaf) categories.
Create a SUB category whose parent must be a MAIN category.
Create a SUB_SUB (leaf) category. Parent must be SUB. Products are only assignable to SUB_SUB categories.

formdata.description: Must be the _id of a SUB category

exec: var j = pm.response.json(); if(j.data && j.data._id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('productId', j.data._id); }

formdata.description: Must be the _id of a SUB_SUB (leaf) category

request.description: Create a new product. The `category` field must reference a SUB_SUB category. Use GET /category/leaf to retrieve valid category IDs.

formdata.description: Array of Cloudinary public IDs to delete

exec: var j = pm.response.json(); if(j.data && j.data.order && j.data.order._id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('orderId', j.data.order._id); }
var j = pm.response.json(); if(j.data && j.data.order && j.data.order._id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('orderId', j.data.order._id); }

request.description: Re-generates SSLCommerz payment URL for a pending order
SSLCommerz IPN callback — called by the payment gateway, not by client

exec: var j = pm.response.json(); if(j.data && j.data._id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('reviewId', j.data._id); }
var j = pm.response.json(); if(j.data && j.data._id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('carouselId', j.data._id); }

request.description: GET /product/vendor/:vendorId — lists active products for a specific vendor store
Full site overview: revenue, orders by status, top products, top vendors, monthly chart
Own revenue, product counts, avg rating, pending deliveries, monthly chart
Public vendor profile: name, avatar, vendorAvgRating, vendorTotalReviews
